svg.title: Audio storage and loading pipeline
svg.desc: How audio goes from microphone through ADC, WAV/MP3 storage, decoder, and finally librosa normalization

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a microphone convert sound to electrical signal?')
sendPrompt('What is an ADC in audio recording and what is bit depth?')
sendPrompt('What are 16-bit PCM integers in audio?')
sendPrompt('What exactly is stored inside a WAV file binary?')
sendPrompt('What is stored inside an MP3 file and how is it compressed?')
sendPrompt('What does the audio decoder do when librosa loads a file?')
sendPrompt('How does librosa normalize audio to float32 between -1 and 1?')
sendPrompt('What is the y array returned by librosa.load?')
g.text: y array — what you see in Python
